title: Ebola was to do?
author: Sudhir Bhatia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This ebook is about the Ebola pandemic outbreak from the year 2014, which describes about the disease itself, tests and the therapies choices along with some administrative issues needed to be adressed.It tells about the previous Ebola outbreaks and the precautions needed. It is for common person as well as medical professionals. It was published in 2014.

It was published in 2014.
